STS2HOSHINO-BULLET.description: Some cards require [gold]Ammo[/gold] to play. You can recover it by [gold]Reloading[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-BULLET.title: Ammo
STS2HOSHINO-RELOAD.title: Reload
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your [gold]Shield[/gold] is not removed. [gold]Shield[/gold] cannot exceed your current [gold]Block[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD.title: Shield
STS2HOSHINO-ARRIVAL.description: Triggers whenever this card is drawn or put into your [gold]Hand[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-ARRIVAL.title: Entry
STS2HOSHINO-OUTOFAMMO.description: Triggers when this card is played with 0 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-OUTOFAMMO.title: Out of Ammo
STS2HOSHINO-EXPERT.description: Whenever you [gold]Reload[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to this value.
STS2HOSHINO-EXPERT.title: Expert
